title: 📚 Educational Doctrine (Educational Errors)
sub: Educational error messages the AI receives when it breaks a constraint. Edit to tune tone & doctrine without restarting the daemon. Add/remove codes = code changes in
search_tip: Filter educational error messages by code (ERR_*) or title. Client-side, no backend round-trip.
empty: No entries yet. Check the seed in
modal_hint: Title & error_code are fixed in code (read-only). You can only tune the message text + evolution hint the AI sees.
error_code_tip: Unique identifier for this error (read-only). Changed in educational_errors_seed.go.
title_tip: Short description of the situation that triggers this error (read-only). Changed in source.
msg_tip: Text the AI receives when it breaks this rule. Use %s as a placeholder for dynamic values.
hint_label: Evolution Hint (how to get out of the mistake)
hint_tip: Concrete, actionable guidance for the AI to recover and improve next time.
save_tip: Save message + evolution hint changes to the database. Takes effect immediately.
msg_required: Message and hint cannot be empty.
edit_btn_tip: Open a modal to tune message_template + evolution_hint. error_code + title are locked (edit in source).
